---
title: "Landmark Guessr"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="mongolia-shell province-shell">
  <section class="hero-panel province-hero">
    <div class="hero-copy">
      <p class="eyebrow">Interactive Mongolia Map Game</p>
      <h1>Landmark Guessr</h1>
      <p class="hero-text">
        A famous Mongolian landmark appears in the prompt. Click where you think it is on the map.
        Correct clicks keep the streak alive. A miss ends the run and starts a fresh landmark order.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-chips">
        <span class="chip">11 landmarks</span>
        <span class="chip">No repeats in a run</span>
        <span class="chip">Map precision</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-side">
      <div class="date-badge" id="landmarkStatusBadge">Loading landmark run...</div>
      <a class="fact-link-card" href="index.html">
        <p class="mini-label">All games</p>
        <h2>Back to the launcher.</h2>
        <p class="motif-note">Jump back to the hub or switch over to the province and fact games.</p>
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="stats-strip">
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Current streak</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="landmarkStreakValue">0</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Best streak</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="landmarkBestValue">0</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Run progress</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="landmarkProgressValue">0 / 11</p>
    </article>
    <article class="stat-card">
      <p class="stat-label">Remaining</p>
      <p class="stat-value" id="landmarkRemainingValue">11</p>
    </article>
  </section>

  <section class="province-grid">
    <article class="province-panel">
      <div class="question-meta">
        <span class="meta-pill">Target landmark</span>
        <span class="meta-pill subtle" id="landmarkIndexPill">Pick 1 of 11</span>
      </div>
      <h2 id="landmarkPrompt">Loading landmark...</h2>
      <p class="question-lead" id="landmarkLead">
        Click the map where you think the landmark sits. You do not need to hit the exact pixel, but
        you do need to be close.
      </p>
      <div class="map-shell">
        <div class="map-frame" id="landmarkMapFrame">
          <div class="map-loading" id="landmarkMapLoading">Drawing Mongolia...</div>
          <svg id="landmarkMap" class="province-map landmark-map" viewBox="0 0 900 640" aria-label="Mongolia landmark map"></svg>
          <div class="feedback-panel province-popup" id="landmarkFeedbackPanel" hidden>
            <p class="feedback-result" id="landmarkFeedbackResult"></p>
            <p class="feedback-fact" id="landmarkFeedbackText"></p>
            <button class="primary-button" id="landmarkContinueButton" type="button">Next landmark</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel-actions">
        <button class="ghost-button" id="landmarkRestartButton" type="button">Restart run</button>
      </div>
    </article>

    <aside class="info-panel">
      <h3>How it works</h3>
      <ul class="rules-list">
        <li>Each run shuffles the landmark deck into a new random order.</li>
        <li>The same landmark never repeats until the run is reset.</li>
        <li>Correct clicks keep the streak and move to the next landmark.</li>
        <li>A wrong click ends the streak and starts a fresh landmark order.</li>
        <li>The map shows both your click and the correct location after each guess.</li>
      </ul>
      <div class="mini-panel">
        <p class="mini-label">Current run</p>
        <p id="landmarkRunSummary">Preparing the landmark sequence...</p>
      </div>
    </aside>
  </section>
</div>

<dialog id="landmarkWinnerDialog" class="winner-dialog">
  <div class="winner-content">
    <p class="eyebrow">Map Cleared</p>
    <h2>You found every landmark in the deck.</h2>
    <p id="landmarkWinnerMessage">Restart to play another landmark run.</p>
    <div class="winner-actions">
      <button class="primary-button" id="landmarkWinnerRestartButton" type="button">Play another run</button>
      <a class="ghost-button" href="index.html">All games</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</dialog>

<script src="landmark-guessr.js"></script>
```
